creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I didn't know you were traveling, but I knew you had a lot going on.  Still, 2 weeks is a pretty long time and normally a quick post on the PR like, "I see this, I can't do anything with it for 2 more weeks" will get an extension.

so you have 2 weeks for any response, not two weeks to approve. :)

I'll leave this at patch ready though.  It's a one-line change and looks reasonable based on error and patch.
